summary: Current-state reconciliation continues away from surface-only W-route exposure. The source now exposes composition stability as product-facing QuillenExactCategory class API, instantiates those fields for canonical MetrizableLCA strict exact sequences, exposes exact maps of positive-degree Yoneda representatives, adds a direct YonedaExt.ofPositiveChain bridge whose relation, split-factor, and Baer-sum laws descend to Ext classes, connects positive-chain representatives and Ext classes to public Yoneda product relation, split-factor, additivity, and casted associativity laws in both variables, adds public omega-cast associativity bridge theorems that remove the explicit degree-equality argument from positive-chain callers, exposes zero/add/neg/sub/Baer-sum preservation for positive Yoneda Ext degree casts, adds quotient-generator zero/neg/add simp API for PositiveYonedaExt, proves quotient-wide positive-degree Yoneda product associativity with an explicit target-degree cast, exposes the quotient-wide omega-cast associativity bridge for callers, exposes public Baer-sum group laws identifying Baer addition with the local Ext additive group operation, exposes quotient-wide Yoneda product neg/sub laws in both Ext variables, and now exposes public Baer-sum-with-negative-right-summand subtraction laws in both variables. This is real exact-category/Yoneda API progress, but not product completion because the full Yoneda Ext obligation and bounded derived infinity-category obligations remain open.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: no OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract exists.
The exact-category core now exposes class-level composition-stability fields and the canonical MetrizableLCA instance fills them, but the complete original four-task witness is still absent.

Yoneda one-fold extensions and positive-degree chains now expose their ambient exact-category head inflation/deflation maps and descend relation/split-factor/Baer-sum laws through YonedaExt.ofPositiveChain and into public Yoneda product relation, split-factor, additivity, negation, subtraction, and casted associativity laws for positive-chain representatives and Ext classes; positive-degree casts now preserve zero, addition, negation, subtraction, and public Baer sums; quotient-generator zero/neg/add simp lemmas are available; quotient-wide positive-degree Yoneda product associativity is available both with an explicit target-degree cast and with the canonical omega cast; public Baer-sum group laws are available; quotient-wide Yoneda product neg/sub laws are available in both variables; and public Baer-sum-with-negative-right-summand subtraction laws are available in both variables. The full Yoneda Ext group obligation is still not audited as a final positive witness.
Bounded derived infinity-category integration remains incomplete as an original-contract obligation.
remaining_work: Continue from the strengthened exact-category core, positive-chain representative/class product relation/split/additivity/associativity bridge, positive Yoneda Ext cast additive API, quotient-generator simp API, quotient-wide Yoneda product associativity, public Baer-sum group laws, quotient-wide Yoneda product neg/sub laws, and public Baer-sum negative-right-summand subtraction laws into the remaining Yoneda Ext group integration.
Continue the bounded derived infinity-category positive witness integration only after the exact-category and Yoneda obligations are represented by honest Lean declarations.
